trails.name: Lake Daniell Track
trails.description: This is a great walk for families with young children or those people new to tramping. The track is a well formed bench track that can also be completed as a day walk.

trails.name: Cann Gorge Hut - Ada Pass Track
St James Car Park - Cann Gorge Hut Track
ACHERON LOOKOUT LOOP WALK
trails.description: A short loop walk with views that starts from Acheron Accommodation House.

trails.name: Jacks Pass to Mt Isobel Track
Mackenzie Stream Route
trails.description: This route runs from Hurunui Hut to Mackenzie Hut.

trails.name: Kirwans Hut to Mont. Hut Track CLSD
Klondyke Spur Track
trails.description: A steep climb for experienced trampers that leads to a ridge overlooking the Victoria Range.

trails.name: Klondyke Valley Track
trails.description: This route leads  up the valley to a tussock basin enclosed by steep granite cliffs.

trails.name: Lk Christabel(west end) to Hut Track
Lk Christabel Hut - Rough Saddle Track
Mt Isobel Track
trails.description: This is the most popular route to Mt Isobel Summit.

trails.name: Jollies Pass Road to Mt Isobel Track
St James-Anne Saddle to Anne Hut
St James W/Way-Magdalen Bridge to Anne
Alpine Nature Walk
trails.description: The Alpine Nature Walk in Lewis Pass provides an opportunity to break up a long drive while enjoying spectacular scenery and beech forest.

trails.name: St James W/Way - Anne Hut to Christopher
Jolliffe Saddle Track
trails.description: This track connects with Dog Stream Track to make up part of the Dog Stream/Timberland Circuit.

trails.name: NARDOO CREEK ROUTE
trails.description: This route provides access to Nardoo Hut and remotes tops in the area.

trails.name: St James W/Way-Boyle Shelter to Magdal
St James Walkway - Ada Pass to Christoph
Doubtful Valley to Amuri Pass Track
Lucretia Hut Route
trails.description: From the Nina Valley Track, follow Lucretia Hut Route to get to Lucretia Hut.

trails.name: Nina Valley Tk - SH7 to Nina Bivy
Nina Valley to Doubtful Valley Track
Doublful River to Hope River Track
Lake Stream Route
trails.description: Tramp for half a day to arrive at a quaint 2 bunk hut.

trails.name: Lewis Tops Track
trails.description: Climb to the open tops with superb views and picturesque tarns.

trails.name: Robinson Saddle - Top Rob Hut Route
Tui Track
trails.description: From Boyle village on SH7, you can pick up tracks that link the end of the St James Walkway with tracks in Hope valley and Doubtful River, Lake Sumner Forest Park. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: Fowler Pass Track (Guyon Hut to Fowlers)
Fowlers Pass Track
trails.description: Fowlers Pass (1296 m) connects Fowlers Hut on Tophouse Road with Stanley Vale and Lake Guyon huts in the St James Conservation Area.

trails.name: Homestead Run
trails.description: For young families or riders with insufficient time or experience to attempt the full St James Cycle Trail, the Homestead Run will give you a taste of St James.

trails.name: Rough Creek Track
trails.description: This track leads to Lake Christabel.

trails.name: Stanley River Route
trails.description: This marked route links Charlies Saddle to Stanley Vale Hut in the St James Conservation Area.

trails.name: Hanmer Forest Park tramping tracks
trails.description: Tramping tracks in Hanmer Forest range in length from half-day to full-day trips, featuring forest and waterfalls and climbs to the alpine zone.
